title: Create: New Recipes
description: Adds a ton of new recipes to create.
body:
# Create: New Recipes
This mod adds 50 custom recipes to the game. 
If you have any suggestions for what i should add leave a comment on my [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-new-recipes) page.
I plan to add more in the future and make recipes for AE.
## Here you can see the current recipes:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
